description: Installs MinGW-w64 C++ compiler via Chocolatey and configures PATH.

messages.done: C++ toolchain installation and configuration completed.
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.scriptDisabled: C++ installation is disabled in config.
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.
messages.mingwNotInstalled: MinGW-w64 is not installed -- installing via Chocolatey...
messages.mingwNotInPath: MinGW installed but g++ not found in PATH -- may need a new terminal
messages.installDirFromDevDir: Using install directory derived from DEV_DIR: {path}
messages.installDirOverride: Using install directory override from config: {path}
messages.pathUpdateDisabled: User PATH update is disabled in config
messages.pathUpdated: MinGW bin added to user PATH
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
